feat.name: Incredible Beastmaster Companion
feat.text: Your mature animal companions continue to grow and develop. Each of them becomes a nimble or savage animal companion, gaining additional capabilities determined by the type of companion. You choose nimble or savage individually for each companion, including any companion that becomes mature after you take this feat.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
